lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਤਰਸਦੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਮੇਲੇ ਸੋ ਮਿਲੈ ਹਰਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh tarasade jis mele so milai har aae |
lines.english: The 8.4 million species of beings all yearn for the Lord. Those whom He unites, come to be united with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੪॥੬॥੩੯॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh har paaeaa sadaa har naam samaae |4|6|39|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh finds the Lord, and remains forever absorbed in the Lord's Name. ||4||6||39||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sukh saagar har naam hai guramukh paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is the Ocean of Peace; the Gurmukhs obtain it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਹਜੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin naam dhiaaeeai sahaje naam samaae |
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam, night and day, they are easily and intuitively absorbed in the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰੁ ਰਚੈ ਹਰਿ ਸਚ ਸਿਉ ਰਸਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: andar rachai har sach siau rasanaa har gun gaae |1|
lines.english: Their inner beings are immersed in the True Lord; they sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਸੁਖੁ ਲਹਹਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur saranaaee sukh laheh anadin naam dhiaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In the Sanctuary of the Guru, peace is found, meditating on the Naam night and day. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਜਗੁ ਦੁਖੀਆ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re jag dukheea doojai bhaae |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, the world is in misery, engrossed in the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sabad pachhaaneeai har amrit naam samaae |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs realize the Word of the Shabad; they are immersed in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੇ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਲਾਗਈ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: saache mail na laagee man niramal har dhiaae |
lines.english: The truthful ones are not stained by filth. Meditating on the Lord, their minds remain pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਚੰਡੁ ਬਲਾਇਆ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਅੰਧੇਰਾ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur giaan prachandd balaaeaa agiaan andheraa jaae |2|
lines.english: The Guru has lit the brilliant light of spiritual wisdom, and the darkness of ignorance has been dispelled. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮੈਲੇ ਮਲੁ ਭਰੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh maile mal bhare haumai trisanaa vikaar |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are polluted. They are filled with the pollution of egotism, wickedness and desire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮਹਿ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai mail na utarai mar jameh hoe khuaar |
lines.english: Without the Shabad, this pollution is not washed off; through the cycle of death and rebirth, they waste away in misery.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਪ ਤਪ ਸੰਜਮੀ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jap tap sanjamee har kai naam piaar |
lines.english: For the Gurmukh, the love of the Name of the Lord is chanting, deep meditation and self-discipline.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਤੁਰ ਬਾਜੀ ਪਲਚਿ ਰਹੇ ਨਾ ਉਰਵਾਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dhaatur baajee palach rahe naa uravaar na paar |3|
lines.english: Engrossed in this transitory drama, they are not at home in either this world or the next. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਏਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sadaa dhiaaeeai ek naam karataar |
lines.english: The Gurmukh meditates forever on the Name of the One Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਭਨਾ ਜੀਆ ਕਾ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥੪॥੭॥੪੦॥
lines.translit: naanak naam dhiaaeeai sabhanaa jeea kaa aadhaar |4|7|40|
lines.english: O Nanak, meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the Support of all beings. ||4||7||40||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਮੋਹਿ ਵਿਆਪਿਆ ਬੈਰਾਗੁ ਉਦਾਸੀ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh mohi viaapiaa bairaag udaasee na hoe |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are engrossed in emotional attachment; they are not balanced or detached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sreeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਖੋਈਐ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: haumai guramukh khoeeai naam rate sukh hoe |1|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs shed their ego; attuned to the Naam, they find peace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਚੀਨੈ ਸਦਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹਿ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad na cheenai sadaa dukh har darageh pat khoe |
lines.english: They do not comprehend the Word of the Shabad. They suffer in pain forever, and lose their honor in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹੀ ਨਿਤ ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: mere man ahinis poor rahee nit aasaa |
lines.english: O my mind, day and night, you are always full of wishful hopes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਮੋਹੁ ਪਰਜਲੈ ਘਰ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਉਦਾਸਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satagur sev mohu parajalai ghar hee maeh udaasaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Serve the True Guru, and your emotional attachment shall be totally burnt away; remain detached within the home of your heart. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਨਿਚੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: ahinis bhagat kare din raatee haumai maar nichand |
lines.english: Night and day, they perform devotional worship, day and night; subduing their ego, they are carefree.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਬਿਗਸੈ ਹਰਿ ਬੈਰਾਗੁ ਅਨੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh karam kamaavai bigasai har bairaag anand |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs do good deeds and blossom forth; balanced and detached in the Lord, they are in ecstasy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਾਧੂ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਸੋਈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: so saadhoo bairaagee soee hiradai naam vasaae |
lines.english: That person is a Holy Saadhu, and a renouncer of the world, whose heart is filled with the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਹਜਿ ਅਨੰਦੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: vaddai bhaag satasangat paaee har paaeaa sehaj anand |2|
lines.english: By great good fortune, I found the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation; I have found the Lord, with intuitive ease and ecstasy. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਸਤਗੁਰੂ ਦਿਖਾਲਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਆ ਅਘਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan sataguroo dikhaaliaa har ras peea aghaae |3|
lines.english: The True Guru has revealed to him the Treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord; he drinks in the Sublime Essence of the Lord, and is satisfied. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲਾਗਿ ਨ ਤਾਮਸੁ ਮੂਲੇ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: antar laag na taamas moole vichahu aap gavaae |
lines.english: His inner being is not touched by anger or dark energies at all; he has lost his selfishness and conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤੀ ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਬੈਰਾਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: jin kinai paaeaa saadhasangatee poorai bhaag bairaag |
lines.english: Whoever has found it, has done so in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. Through perfect good fortune, such balanced detachment is attained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਲਾਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh fireh na jaaneh satagur haumai andar laag |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs wander around lost, but they do not know the True Guru. They are inwardly attached to egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਰੰਗਾਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਭੈ ਕੇਹੀ ਲਾਗਿ ॥੪॥੮॥੪੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sabad rate har naam rangaae bin bhai kehee laag |4|8|41|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are attuned to the Shabad are dyed in the Color of the Lord's Name. Without the Fear of God, how can they retain this Color? ||4||8||41||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲੀਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: khin khin naam samaaleeai guramukh paavai koe |
lines.english: Each and every moment, dwell on the Naam, the Name of the Lord; the Gurmukhs obtain it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਹੀ ਸਉਦਾ ਪਾਈਐ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਭ ਵਥੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ghar hee saudaa paaeeai antar sabh vath hoe |
lines.english: Within the home of your own inner being, the merchandise is obtained. All commodities are within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਤਜਿ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: mere man taj nindaa haumai ahankaar |
lines.english: O my mind, give up slander, egotism and arrogance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਅਖੁਟੁ ਹੈ ਵਡਭਾਗਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan akhutt hai vaddabhaag paraapat hoe |1|
lines.english: The Treasure of the Naam is inexhaustible. By great good fortune, it is obtained. ||1||
